Enquire
Enquire

Lake Como, Italy

June 2025

Arya & Federico

When a supermodel married her Italian Stallion on a horse Ranch outside Milan, it was so dreamy that they had to have two weddings! Oh and that Aalap on “Fools Rush In"? Absolute goosebumps!

Hyderabad, India

December 2024

Priya & Akshay

Someone somewhere is made for you but you have to open your heart to love like Priya and Akshay did. Beautifully told by The Wedding Filmer crew, they remind us that love is not about finding the perfect person, but about seeing perfection in the person you choose.

Uttarakhand

March 2025

Apoorva & Kshitij

It’s hard to describe Apoorva, but her joy for life says it all. It's infectious, inspiring, and deeply real. That same ease and laughter defines her love with Kshitij. Set in Jim Corbett, an intimate, honest wedding, filmed with a small crew, big hearts, and open skies. Somewhere between sunlight and song, I was reminded why I love what I do.

India

March 2025

Nikki & Vishal

I've written for The Wedding Filmer for years, but this time, I have no words. The love Nikki and I felt; from our crew, friends, and family was overwhelming. Now I know what it truly means to have a Wedding Filmer film to feel it all over again.

Bangalore

January 2014

Faiz & Fajr

Come and witness the Divine in this soul stirring Eid film.

Original compositions

CREATING MUSIC THAT
MAKES YOU FEEL.

The Wedding Filmer label creates music with a keen focus on lyrics and background scores that set the sounds for weddings across cultures.

by Harshdeep Kaur & Devender Pal Singh

as long as we remember it.

NETFLIX'S
THE BIG DAY

SONY GEAR

2013

became
sony alpha india
ambassadors

real wedding films madE by real filmmakers

we invented wedding films

here's what our couples have to say

notes of gratitude

Oh gosh, this movie ❤️ It is pure beauty!! I watched it twice in a day within a span of few hours and cried both times. You were right in how much thought, consideration and work has gone into making the movie. It is clearly evident! Loved how it blends everything, everyone and spreads the message of “Love is Love”!!

- Aayush & Suman

TWF Groom

Thank you so much capturing such special moments, we cried every single time we watched it!

- Mahek Singh

TWF Bride

Vishal, this is so so beautiful. Shlok and I watched it, and we felt so special and emotional. I’ve been showing it to my parents and cousins so many times! Thank you so much for adding your magic to it :)

- Muskan Singhaniya

TWF Bride

Vishal, the video is amazing! Love every second and the music - it's so memorable and made me cry!

- PV. SINDHU

Indian badminton player

This is beautiful! Happy tears... thank you so much!

- SHIBANI DANDEKAR

Indian Actress

Your team has captured the moments so beautifully, all while meeting our family in one day. You guys are truly amazing. We are literally so blessed to have found your team!

- LEENA BHAMRAH

TWF Bride

OMG, this is insane!! I love it. Can't wait to watch the film.

- SANAYA BACHOOALI TAYEB

TWF Bride

I didn't cry at the wedding but I'm all teared up now. Thank you so much!

- Karishma Manwani

TWF Bride

We love it – it's absolutely amazing, summarising the entire weekend so well and far beyond what we thought a wedding filmer could be!

- Arun (Mrwhosetheboss)

Youtuber

Just watched it with our family – not a dry eye in the room, the effort shows, and no one even comes close to ya’ll!

- Tuisha Seksaria

TWF Bride

I'm forever grateful for this wedding film – you've gifted us a treasured lifetime memory and transformed our simple wedding into a masterpiece.

- Raj Sampad

Cinematographer

We watched it three times – you captured the emotion beautifully and immortalized our love story in the most positive way.

- Colm Cosgrove

TWF Groom

I love the film! I just relived my entire wedding.

- Rakul Singh

Indian Actress

Filled with so many emotions, I smiled and teared up throughout the video – I loved it and didn’t want it to end; your team has done a great job!

- Chinmaya Bhandary

TWF Bride

I can't stop watching it – it's so surreal and unbelievable, you and your team are magicians, reminding us of love, happiness, and unity.

- Anita Krishan

TWF Bride

I watched the whole film yesterday, and it was so good – all the wedding memories came rushing back, and my mum and sister started crying again after the trailer!

- Jasprit Bumrah

Indian Cricketer

It's so beautiful. I want to keep it to myself!

- Kiara Advani

Indian Actress

I cried, Justin cried. You made us relive the emotions we experienced on our wedding day. So many emotions came running back to me.

- Kamakshi Sharma

TWF Bride

WOW! This is mind blowing. Sikhs and Greeks will be the theme tune to our life, forever.

- Rusna Kohli Michael

Entrepreneur

Thank you TWF for capturing the spirit of our dream desert elopement.

- Simran Kohli

TWF Bride

I now want to shoot a film with you, Vishal

- DEEPIKA PADUKONE

Indian Actress

why the wedding filmer?

heartfelt • cinematic • timeless

powerful storytelling

heartfelt dialogues

Intimate conversations that capture the humor, drama, emotion, and love of your wedding, forming the backbone of your film. It's therapeutic, and our expertise shines through in every story we tell.

pioneering cinema

cinematic excellence

With decades of film-making experience, we use state-of-the-art technology to reinvent ourselves for every story. Our pioneering approach ensures each wedding film is a unique masterpiece.

signature soundscapes

timeless tunes

Every memory needs a melody. Our award-winning music, crafted exclusively for you, harmonizes with your wedding's mood and story. With big Bollywood hits, we've reinvented wedding music into an essential, unforgettable experience.
